description: HEIDENHAIN: Measurement and control technology for demanding positioning tasks DR. JOHANNES HEIDENHAIN GmbH develops and produces linear encoders, angle encoders, rotary encoders, and CNC controls for demanding positioning tasks. Rounding out its product portfolio are touch probes, camera systems, length gauges, digital readouts, signal converters, testing devices, and inspection devices. What's more, its practical software solutions for the Digital Shop Floor empower end users to fully digitalize their manufacturing ecosystem. HEIDENHAIN products are primarily used in high-accuracy machine tools as well as manufacturing and processing systems for electronic components. Thanks to its extensive expertise in developing and manufacturing encoders and controls, HEIDENHAIN is in an excellent position to automate the production machines and systems of tomorrow, supplying a number of critical and innovative industries, including machine tools, electronics, robotics, medical technology, elevators, and metrology.

description: KGK at MTA 2026 – Precision Machining & Smart Manufacturing Solutions KGK is pleased to announce our participation in MTA 2026, where we will showcase advanced machine tools and solutions from leading Japanese manufacturers. This year, our focus is on precision machining, productivity improvement, and smart monitoring technologies for modern manufacturing. Featured products at our booth include: • Kuroda Seiko – Precision Rotary Surface Grinder (GSR-600) Delivering high accuracy, excellent surface finish, and stable performance for precision components. • Takamatsu Machinery – CNC Lathe (AT-1) A compact and powerful machine designed for high-speed, high-precision mass production. • Kitagawa – Power Chuck Ensuring strong, stable, and accurate workholding for a wide range of machining applications. • Yamamoto Metal – Wireless Acceleration Sensor “b-lex” Enables real-time vibration monitoring to optimize performance and reduce downtime (planned integration with Takamatsu AT-1). • NT TOOL – Quick Change Adapter for CNC Lathe Reduces setup time and improves operational efficiency with fast tool changes. • Adcole – Crankshaft Measuring System (Panel Display) Advanced measurement solution ensuring high accuracy and quality control for critical components. ⸻ Visit KGK at MTA 2026 to explore how our solutions can enhance your manufacturing capabilities. description: With total sales of over USD 1.5 billion, UNITED MACHINING SOLUTIONS is one of the largest machine tool manufacturers in the world. With around 5,000 employees at over 50 global production, service and sales locations, UNITED MACHINING SOLUTIONS is close to its customers and highly efficient. The group is organized into two divisions: UNITED GRINDING and UNITED MACHINING. UNITED GRINDING includes the brands MÄGERLE, BLOHM, JUNG, STUDER, SCHAUDT, MIKROSA, WALTER, EWAG and IRPD. Its technologies include surface and profile grinding machines, cylindrical grinding machines, machines for tool machining and machine tools for additive manufacturing. The UNITED MACHINING division includes the brands AGIE CHARMILLES, CHARMILLES, MIKRON MILL, LIECHTI, STEP TEC and SYSTEM 3R. It includes machines for EDM (Electrical Discharge Machining), high-speed milling and laser technology as well as spindle production and automation solutions.

description: ATOKA, a core brand of Zhejiang Eagle Technology Co., Ltd., is a trusted manufacturer specializing in advanced precision metrology solutions. With over 16 years of experience in research and development, Eagle has established a strong foundation in delivering innovative and reliable measurement technologies to global industries. ATOKA focuses on the integration of R&D, manufacturing, and technical services, offering a comprehensive portfolio of high-performance measurement systems, including Coordinate Measuring Machines (CMM), 2D–2.5D Optical Vision Measuring Machines (VMM), high-speed Flash Measurement Systems, as well as profile and surface roughness measuring instruments. Designed to meet the increasing demands of modern manufacturing, ATOKA solutions enable fast, accurate, and repeatable measurement results, supporting quality control and production efficiency across industries such as automotive, electronics, precision engineering, mold and tooling, and medical devices. Backed by nearly 80 patents and intellectual property rights—including invention patents, software copyrights, utility models, and industrial designs—Eagle demonstrates strong technological capabilities and a commitment to continuous innovation. With a forward-looking vision, ATOKA is dedicated to delivering high-precision, efficient, and intelligent metrology solutions, empowering manufacturers worldwide to achieve higher standards of quality and performance.

We always bring you more innovative technology and systems, deeper expertise and an attention to detail that stands for Quality First and above all. Doing our unconditional best is more than a goal, it’s a responsibility we feel to our customers. Today, our PROMISE OF PERFORMANCE drives everything we do for you. Makino is the collaborator who’s fully invested in helping you perform at the highest level. We come through when you need it the most You can depend on our machines and our people to get the job done – no matter what. Day after day after week after year, we work hard to live up to Makino’s reputation of reliability. We measure our success by your success Everything our machines do – and everything we do to build and support them – is centered around you. We’re here to help you do your most important CNC machining work and meet your customers’ highest expectations. Makino is more than our name. It’s our word.

description: Profiroll Technologies GmbH – Precision in cold forming MACHINES, TOOLS AND PROCESSES FROM A SINGLE SOURCE Profiroll Technologies GmbH develops and manufactures machines, tools and technologies for cold forming in Germany. Customers benefit from the integrated solution approach: machines, die and processes from one source. CORE COMPETENCE: ROLLING TECHNOLOGY The equipment portfolio includes CNC-controlled machines for thread, profile, spline and cold ring rolling. It is complemented by intelligent software solutions, sensor technology and process visualisation. With its e-Rolling product line, Profiroll also offers assistance systems for automatic temperature and hardness compensation, tool monitoring and quality assurance in continuous operation. NEW: AXIAL SPLINE FORMING With the newly developed PA 450 axial spline forming machine, Profiroll is expanding its portfolio with a process for the economical production of small internal splines. The tool profile is transferred to the workpiece in an axial process – ideal for components with small internal diameters, such as rotor shafts for electric motors. INDUSTRY DIVERSITY Profiroll's technologies are used in numerous industries: automotive and supplier industry, aerospace, energy and drive technology, wind power, and roller bearing and fastener industry. The processes for manufacturing heavy-duty and complex components are also used in the field of robotics. CONTRIBUTION TO ELECTROMOBILITY One focus of current development is on applications for e-mobility. These include, in particular, rotor shafts for electric motors and components for brake and steering systems. These markets are key drivers of Profiroll's corporate growth. INTERNATIONAL ORIENTATION In addition to its headquarters in Bad Düben, Profiroll has branches in China, Japan, the USA, India, Spain, Italy and Poland. Further partners in Europe, Asia and South America ensure a global sales and service presence.

description: LKM's main business lines are standard mould bases, high precision interchangeable plates, custom-made mould bases, precision machining and mould components. LKM operates a number of production facilities in Asia, with a workforce of over 4000 employees and a portfolio of over 600 CNC machining centres. Delivering genuine value The life-time value of an injection or die-cast mould is a function of the longevity of a mould, the direct cost of mould, the indirect costs of fitting and maintenance services, and the simplicity of the production and ownership process. By combining our experienced workforce with advanced machining capabilities and a trustworthy business model, our customers find using LKM products is a highly effective way to reduce long-term and hidden costs, thereby maximising long-term value. Industry recognition In many Asian markets, the LKM Standard is associated with quality and reliability. LKM is regarded as a highly reliable partner in the manufacturing value chain by end-users in electronics, automotive and medical equipment industries. Many end-users list “LKM-sourced products” in their standard technical requirements, and consider this as the hassle-free way to upgrade the long-term value of their mould projects. Innovations: First company in Greater China to use CNC machining centres for mould base manufacturing in 1987 Upgraded manufacturing process to CNC-machining-centre-driven, fully replacing traditional milling and drilling machines Created the first online certification system in mould base industry Developed online platform for “add-on” machining services Introduced more eco-friendly precision milling to replace grinding across standard products With over 230 robotic arms, fully automated production of standard plates and parts.

With over 50 years of machining expertise, we empower manufacturing operations across diverse sectors, including automotive, semiconductors, medical, aerospace, electrical, beverage and machine tool industries. With our headquartered in Japan and manufacturing facilities in Japan, China, Malaysia, and Vietnam alongside a global network of sales offices, we deliver components directly from our factories to customers in over 40 countries worldwide. description: RDI Technologies is a Knoxville-based technology company specializing in high-tech vibration analysis and predictive maintenance. We are best known for pioneering Motion Amplification®, a proprietary video-processing technology that allows users to see and measure motion invisible to the naked eye. Core Technology: Motion Amplification® The company’s primary innovation is turning standard video cameras into massive arrays of sensors. Virtual Sensors: Their software treats every pixel in a video frame as an independent sensor. This allows for millions of data points to be collected simultaneously without physical contact with the machinery. Visualization: The software amplifies subtle vibrations and movements, creating a video where the physical displacement is visually obvious. This helps engineers identify root causes—like structural looseness or misalignment—that would be difficult to spot using traditional "point-based" sensors like accelerometers. Why It’s Significant RDI's technology bridges the gap between complex data and human intuition. Instead of relying solely on "squiggly lines" (waveforms and spectrums), maintenance teams can watch a video of a machine vibrating in real-time. This makes it significantly easier to communicate technical issues to non-technical stakeholders and speeds up the repair process across industries like manufacturing, power generation, and aerospace.

product_categories: Boring / Drilling / Tapping Machines,Broaching & Shaping Machines,EDMs & Wire-Cut Machines,Grinding Machines,Lathes,Metal Cutting Machines - Others,Milling Machines,Machining Centres,Sawing Machines
description: Thinh Qua Trading Service One Member Co., Ltd. (Vietnam) was established in 2008 and is located in Ho Chi Minh City, the largest economic hub and seaport of Vietnam. It serves as the first stepping stone for Thinh Qua's expansion into international markets, with a strong presence across Southeast Asia. Currently, the company's headquarters is located at Mieu Ong Cu Intersection – Binh Chuan Ward, Thuan An City, Binh Duong Province. The company primarily operates in the field of industrial machinery, including CNC machining centers, laser cutting machines, welding equipment, mold processing machines, mechanical stamping equipment, hydraulic presses, EDM machines, and other related products. In addition, the company owns a modern 5,000 m² showroom that integrates product display, warehousing, and office space, providing customers with a one-stop purchasing solution for mechanical equipment. description: Gerardi is a leading European company, globally recognized for the quality and reliability of its clamping and industrial automation solutions. Founded to deliver precision modular vises for the most demanding machining needs, Gerardi stands out for its excellent price-to-quality ratio, offering high performance at competitive costs. Its precision modular vises are designed to cover most workshop clamping requirements at the lowest possible cost and are supported by a 5-year warranty. The Gerardi system includes a wide range of interchangeable vises, spacers, jaws, and inserts, ensuring flexible and customizable solutions for different applications. Gerardi is also a key reference in the production of tombstones for horizontal machines, offering one of the widest ranges on the market. Its modular ecosystem also features the Zero Point system for fast setup, changing, and positioning of equipment, significantly reducing downtime and improving productivity, enabling turnkey clamping solutions for any requirement. Another core strength is the production of high-performance angular heads for both CNC and conventional machines, as well as driven tools for CNC lathes. These solutions, enabling milling, drilling, and tapping operations, are highly valued for their precision and reliability, particularly in aerospace, automotive, and other high-precision industries. In recent years, Gerardi has expanded into automation with its ROBI system for automatic production changeover. The portfolio now also includes robotic grippers, automatic vises, and automatic Zero Point systems, representing advanced industrial automation and enabling highly efficient production management with reduced setup times. Today, Gerardi remains a strategic global partner, delivering innovative, precise, and reliable solutions while continuously investing in technology and customer-focused innovation.

description: Innse-Berardi, part of Camozzi Group, is based in Brescia. Specializing in the engineering, production, and commissioning of high-tech and best-performing machine tools, it serves as a benchmark for the heavy mechanical industries, such as Energy (Oil & Gas, nuclear, wind), Transportation (railway, marine, automotive), and Aerospace. Innse-Berardi offers a comprehensive range of products suitable for various application sectors. The Atlas series includes vertical multitasking machining centers, whereas the Aries series comprises advanced horizontal boring and milling machines, both equipped with either hydrostatic or mechanical technologies. Additionally, the PowerMax® family specializes in high-speed milling and trimming of large, complex-geometry parts in aluminum, titanium, and hard metals. This extensive product line establishes Innse-Berardi as a strategic and reliable technological partner, providing turnkey solutions based on deep experience in processing complex components. In response to the requirements of Industry 4.0, Innse-Berardi's machines are engineered to enable the integration of production lines into a connected digital system. IBNET and IBRM are the digital platforms developed by Innse-Berardi in collaboration with Camozzi Digital to enhance production management, monitoring operating conditions and include predictive maintenance.

description: VERNAL has been dedicated to manufacturing custom parts and assemblies for the past 40 years. We offer a range of services, including forming, machining, assembly, and precise measurement verification. As a trusted solution provider and technical supporter, we collaborate with our customers in the early stage of product development to meet their high-quality requirements. Our team of experts works diligently in a well-designed and employee-friendly environment to fulfill each customer’s unique needs. VERNAL is proud to present our new product line, VERNALCO, which specializes in driven tool holders for Swiss type CNC machine. Our exceptional capabilities enable us to design and fabricate such holders to meet the demands of high-precision machining. We ensure the quality of each holder through rigorous precision monitoring, conducting production and inspection in controlled environments with appropriate temperature and humidity levels. Additionally, all holders must pass dynamic tests before they are delivered. By continuing to enhance production capacity, Vernalco is prepared to deal with a broader range of machining requirements. VERNALCO is on a par with established firms in terms of the precision and quality of driven tool holders. In addition to possessing impeccable high-precision fabrication skills and offering diverse products, we also have the ability to satisfy custom requirements for driven tool holders and can adjust our operations to fulfill various machining needs. This gives our customers and us confidence that we can tackle any difficult challenges that may arise

description: LMS Technologies Vietnam is proud to be one of the 5 members of the LMS Group - headquartered in Singapore. With over 15 years of establishment and development, we have established our position in the Vietnamese market as the leading distributor of world-class Scientific Equipment and Engineering Consulting Services. description: Honor Seiki Co., Ltd. continues to develop quality CNC Vertical lathe and Vertical turning center to meet the highest standards in precision, efficiency, and reliability. Honor Seiki was founded in 1987, with more than 35 years of experience in VTL machine design and manufacturing. HONOR SEIKI is the most professional, leading brand, machine tool provider which has international quality certificates and well reputation in the fields of CNC Vertical Lathe and Turnkey solutions in Taiwan. Honor Seiki adapted the dual channels of standard VTL and industry solutions to increase its market share. The strength of Honor Seiki is customized design to meet the user’s requirements such as special jigs & fixtures, and robotic loading & unloading to increase both volume and quality of mass production. The worldwide patent “Solid Lock" clamping System and “Roller Gear Transmission System” are our capabilities. We mainly focus on the production of Vertical lathes and strive to do it well. Achieving and fulfilling customers’ satisfaction is our mission. We are proud of providing our machines to many leading companies around the world. The main application fields of Honor’s machine are the aerospace industry, defense industry, automotive industry, railway industry, mining industry, oil, and gas industry, wind energy, and so on. Continuing improvement is the unrelenting mission of Honor Seiki. Based on the concepts of Sustainable management, High Quality, High Efficiency, Well-Accuracy, Honesty, and Responsibility are our promises to cooperative partners.

description: JJ TOOLS is a South Korea-based manufacturer specializing in high-performance cutting tools for the metalworking industry. Since its establishment, the company has focused on delivering reliable tooling solutions through continuous investment in technology, quality control, and product development. Our product portfolio includes solid carbide end mills, drills, thread mills, reamers, carbide inserts, PCD/CBN tools, and customized tooling solutions for a wide range of machining applications. JJ TOOLS serves customers in various industries, including automotive, aerospace, mold & die, medical, energy, and general precision engineering. With advanced manufacturing facilities and strict quality management systems, JJ TOOLS is committed to providing consistent product quality, competitive lead times, and technical support to customers worldwide. The company continuously expands its product range and manufacturing capabilities to meet the evolving demands of modern machining environments. Today, JJ TOOLS exports its products to distributors and end users across Asia, Europe, North America, the Middle East, and other global markets. Through close cooperation with its partners, JJ TOOLS strives to build long-term business relationships based on trust, innovation, and mutual growth. Our mission is to provide cost-effective and reliable cutting tool solutions that enhance machining performance and productivity for customers around the world.

description: Carbide insert Manufacturer GUASS SPECIAL METAL PRODUCTS CORP. established in 1990 as a Carbide Insert Manufacturer, specializes in the field of tungsten carbide forming and sintering. In 1993, we began producing carbide inserts, offering high-quality and stable milling options for CNC milling machines. During this period, we received extensive positive feedback and earned the trust and praise of our customers. Consequently, we have actively and continuously developed our range of carbide inserts to meet the diverse demands of various industries, including aviation, plastics, machinery, food, automotive, electronics, and more, many of which are now our partners. In the past few decades, in addition to obtaining the ISO system quality assurance (AFAQ certification of 9001 2000 Bell of France), we also have never stopped investing in each new equipment, all for the purpose of supplying high & stable quality carbide inserts to the industry, supporting customers the smooth and stable production, and built a long-term and stable cooperative relations. Be ahead of the generation change. Therefore, Guass factory can provide all kinds of "turning inserts, milling inserts, drilling inserts, boring inserts, grooving inserts, cutting inserts" and all kinds of special shapes of carbide products. We adhere to "quality, technology, service" as our main business policy, believing that as long as we cooperate with customer requirements and create industry profits together, it will be able to achieve a win-win direction for all three, and expand the business to all worldwide.

description: Walter is one of the world’s leading manufacturers of cutting tools. Founded in 1919 and headquartered in Tübingen, Germany, the company develops, manufactures and supplies precision tools for the metalworking industry. This includes products for milling, turning, holemaking and threading applications – as well as matching tool adaptors and services. Walter takes a holistic approach that brings together all the essential components of machining and reduces complexity for customers. The company’s entire range helps customers to achieve alignment of their production in a cost-effective, efficient and reliable manner. With its complete solution concept, Walter positions itself as an end-to-end partner. This covers the entire machining process: from high-performance standard tools and custom special tools to tailor-made process solutions. This offering is complemented by innovative apps and software solutions for digital connectivity. Altogether, Walter provides tailored solutions for a wide range of requirements in the metal industry. Walter is at home in numerous sectors, including general mechanical engineering, aerospace, automotive and energy. In all these areas, the company supports its customers in machining components made from a wide variety of metal materials with precision, cost-effectiveness and reliability. This is embodied by the company’s brand promise - Engineering Kompetenz.

description: Forming Innovations since 1893 Technical innovations have determined the rise of WAFIOS ever since the first wire fencing machine was developed. We are proud of our tradition, and to this day its strongest stabilizer is the innovative corporate culture and the proverbial inventive spirit of our Swabian homeland. We develop, design, and produce sophisticated machinery for the wire and tube-processing industry and for cold-forging applications. description: MODUL gear cutting machines are the safe choice when it comes to precise and efficient manufacturing of gears. MODUL has repeatedly set new standards in innovative gear manufacturing technologies since 1950. MODUL offers hobbing, chamfering and deburring and power skiving to cover the complete technology range for soft machining of gears. Skiving (hobbing of hardened gears) and our power skiving machine are also provided for hard machining of gears. MODUL gear cutting machines are successfully used in many industrial sectors, including automotive and e-mobility, robotic, aerospace, railway, agricultural machinery and commercial vehicles, energy sector and at manufacturers of industrial components. MODUL gear cutting machines are ideal for wheel-type gears and shafts for transmissions, shafts with multiple gears, gears made from special materials, gears on crankshafts as well as for milling and chamfering / deburring. MODUL gear cutting machines deliver high productivity and flexibility for both single-piece or small-batch and mass production with a high level of automation and customization.

description: Fact Base is a SaaS startup for the manufacturing industry, founded in September 2022, with the mission of “making manufacturing seamless.” Its core product, the drawing management system “ZUMEN,” was developed to enable digital transformation (DX) for small and medium-sized enterprises and local factories. In many manufacturing sites, paper drawings and related documents still play a central role in operations, and due to the complexity of managing them, accumulated data is not being fully utilized. “ZUMEN” addresses these challenges by centrally managing drawings and related documents in the cloud, significantly improving efficiency in complex management tasks. As a first step toward data utilization in manufacturing, it is being increasingly adopted by small factories and SMEs.

description: Echaintool Precision Co., Ltd. is a professional manufacturer of CNC cutting tools, providing a comprehensive range of solutions for metalworking applications. Our product portfolio includes turning tool holders, indexable inserts for threading, grooving and parting-off, U-drills, coolant-through carbide drills, and solid carbide end mills. Serving industries such as general machining, automotive, aerospace, energy, and precision engineering, Echaintool is committed to delivering reliable tooling performance for a wide variety of materials including steel, stainless steel, and cast iron. More than just a cutting tool supplier, Echaintool focuses on solving real machining challenges. By combining practical application experience with advanced tool design, we help customers improve machining stability, extend tool life, and enhance overall productivity. Our goal is to reduce cost per component while ensuring consistent and high-quality results. With flexible production capabilities and efficient supply support, Echaintool responds quickly to market demands and provides dependable service to global partners, including distributors and end users. Echaintool is also committed to sustainable and environmentally friendly manufacturing. Through optimized tool design, extended tool life, and efficient resource utilization, we help reduce waste, lower energy consumption, and support more sustainable production processes. We believe that cutting tools are not only products, but key elements in optimizing manufacturing processes. Echaintool continues to develop innovative and practical solutions to support sustainable and competitive production in modern industries. Overseas agents wanted.

description: Tailift Group is a Taiwan-funded enterprise specializing in customer service. The company was founded in 1973. Chairman Mr. Lin Xiwen led a group of professional engineering technicians to create its own brand based on the business philosophy of "Taiwan Technology Upgrading" and led the brand to the international market with professionalism, innovation and service. In Tailift's 51-year history, our employees have always been one of our important assets. The average service experience of personnel in each department is more than 15 years. Our production team implements TPS management and establishes a TPS culture to ensure the precision and the quality of production, the members of Tailift are like a family, they have a simple culture and employees, and our team is committed to growing with our customers and moving into the future. Since it began producing radial drilling machines in 1975, Tailift has successively developed logistics handling equipment (stackers), sheet metal processing equipment (NCT turret computer punch presses, laser cutting equipment, CNC folding machine equipment), automation Equipment (multi-axis tea press, machining center) and other products. Based on the excellent foundation of punching machines in the past 40 years, Tailift not only provides top-notch fiber laser equipment, but will also provide a full range of laser sheet metal technology solutions with complete laser applications in the future to create higher product value for customers.

Our production team implements TPS management and establishes a TPS culture to ensure the precision and the quality of production, the members of Tailift are like a family, they have a simple culture and employees, and our team is committed to growing with our customers and moving into the future. Since it began producing radial drilling machines in 1975, Tailift has successively developed logistics handling equipment (stackers), sheet metal processing equipment (NCT turret computer punch presses, laser cutting equipment, CNC folding machine equipment), automation Equipment (multi-axis tea press, machining center) and other products. Based on the excellent foundation of punching machines in the past 40 years, Tailift not only provides top-notch fiber laser equipment, but will also provide a full range of laser sheet metal technology solutions with complete laser applications in the future to create higher product value for customers. description: DHF is a professional cutting tool supplier established in 1999 located in Taiwan. We are specialized in producing HSC & HHC Solid Carbide End Mills. We constantly innovate and test our manufacturing techniques to improve our product competitiveness. Also, our quality control and production process are being carefully monitored with strict standard. Because of DHF's persistence, we can uphold our business principles: Outstanding quality, high efficiency, and high customer satisfaction. DHF owns precise end mills measuring instrument, Rollomatic from Switzerland as our major processing equipment, Zoller's advanced endmill detector, and professional coating machine to ensure our quality stability. description: SMS Precision Machines GmbH, established in 1995, is one of the leading companies producing high-precision, CNC-controlled thread grinding machines for external and internal threads. With about 85 employees SMS produces worm- and thread grinding machines for various applications such as grinding of worms, ball-screws, thread-gauges, taps, hobs and shaper cutters. Located in the strong and powerful German southwest, annually nearly 40 machines are produced on 1500 m2 assembly area. Each machine comprises a state-of-the-art CNC-control along with menu-guided, user-friendly dialogue software for shop-floor programming and is equipped with latest remote diagnostic capabilities. SMS maintains a quality management system to fulfil the requirements of ISO 9001:2015. More than 60% of the machines are exported to end-users world-wide.

description: Leading Brand in Centralized Lubrication Systems Founded in 1978, Chen Ying Oil Machine Co., Ltd. is a leading manufacturer of Centralized Lubrication Systems, specializing in oil and grease lubrication solutions, such as manual and electric lubricators, pumps, distributors, and a complete range of accessories. With over 47 years of professional manufacturing experience, Chen Ying offers customized solutions tailored to diverse industrial applications, ensuring optimal machine performance, extended equipment life, and reduced maintenance costs. Commitment to Integrity, Professionalism, and Quality Chen Ying has always been committed to the business philosophy of "integrity, professionalism, and quality" and has always sourced the best quality parts and the most durable components within the assembly of each product. The company continually pursues excellence and faces every product challenge without compromise. This uncompromising approach has earned Chen Ying strong recognition and long-term trust from customers worldwide. Professional R & D that Sustains an Eternal Leadership Position Chen Ying has always been committed to engaging in innovative R & D. and has produced many newly-patented products, which can significantly reduce customer costs and enhance machinery equipment performance. With a strong engineering foundation, Chen Ying focuses on creating user-friendly, modular, and high-efficiency lubrication systems that meet the evolving needs of modern manufacturing and automation industries. Your Reliable Partner in the Global Industry Chen Ying serves a wide range of industries, including machine tools, automation, CNC machining, automation systems, and heavy-duty equipment. Its products are exported worldwide, with a strong presence in Asia, Europe, the United Sates, and the Middle East. As a trusted partner, Chen Ying is dedicated to building long-term collaborations and supporting customers with high-quality lubrication solutions on the global stage.

product_categories: Lathes,Machining Centres
description: INDEX - better.parts.faster. With its INDEX and TRAUB brands, the INDEX Group is today one of the world’s leading manufacturers of CNC turning machines. The Company Group in Esslingen has 80 sites worldwide with 6 production sites and 12 international sales and service companies as well as an extensive retailer network. Progress has a long tradition INDEX-Werke were set up in 1914 by Hermann Hahn who began that year with the production of automatic turret turning machines. He was a Swabian entrepreneur through and through who laid the foundation for an impressive development with creative ideas and an aspiration for quality. Within four decades, more than 20,000 turning machines had been sold and these formed the basis for the excellent reputation of INDEX around the world. In 1975, INDEX began with the production of multi-spindle turning machines. A few years later, the company entered the market for CNC technology. And INDEX soon assumed a pioneering role here. After the death of Eugen Hahn, the son of the company’s founder, 85% of the company shares were put into a foundation. In 1992, INDEX presented a new generation of turn-mill centers based on a modular component system. In 1997, TRAUB Drehmaschinen GmbH & Co. KG from neighboring Reichenbach/Fils was taken over and integrated into the INDEX Group. The company pursues a two-brand strategy to this very day.
address: Plochinger Straße 92, Esslingen

In 1992, INDEX presented a new generation of turn-mill centers based on a modular component system. In 1997, TRAUB Drehmaschinen GmbH & Co. KG from neighboring Reichenbach/Fils was taken over and integrated into the INDEX Group. The company pursues a two-brand strategy to this very day. Address: Plochinger Straße 92, Esslingen. Pavilion: German Pavilion.

description: Leistritz Produktionstechnik GmbH – Precision in Machine Tools and Cutting Tools Leistritz Produktionstechnik GmbH, headquartered in Pleystein, Germany, has been a technological leader in machine tools and precision cutting tools for decades. With around 350 employees, the company develops and manufactures solutions that are used worldwide in the automotive industry, mechanical engineering, and other high-tech sectors. Machine Tools – Innovation with Tradition As one of the leading manufacturers of whirling and keyseating machines, Leistritz offers highly efficient and precise production solutions for demanding applications. While keyseating machines are used in e.g. pump and agricultural technology, whirling machines are indispensable in drivetrain technology and the automotive industry. Our machines stand out for their highest accuracy, durability, and continuous development in close cooperation with customer requirements. Precision Cutting Tools – Efficiency in Machining Complementing its machine tool portfolio, Leistritz provides a comprehensive range of tailor-made cutting tools. The product spectrum includes among others milling cutters, drills, end-finishing tools, as well as innovative solutions. With customized solutions, Leistritz plays a key role in improving productivity and cost efficiency in machining processes. Integrated Expertise from a Single Source The unique strength of Leistritz lies in the combination of machine tool engineering and tool technology. Customers benefit from deep process know-how and perfectly aligned solutions – from development and manufacturing to application. This close integration not only ensures technological excellence but also creates sustainable competitive advantages for our partners. With a strong focus on quality, innovation, and long-term collaboration, Leistritz Produktionstechnik GmbH is a trusted partner for companies that demand the highest levels of precision and efficiency in machining.

description: YIH KUAN ENT CO., LTD. is a professional milling head manufacturer based in Taiwan, with nearly 50 years of experience in design and manufacturing. We specialize in the development, production, and application integration of various types of milling heads. Our main product range includes turret milling heads, gantry (plano) milling heads, and angle heads, which are widely applied in conventional milling machines, gantry machines, and various machining equipment. We are also capable of recommending suitable configurations based on different machining requirements. In addition to manufacturing high-quality milling heads, YIH KUAN has extensive experience in machine retrofitting and upgrading projects. Based on the customer’s existing machine conditions, applications, and operational needs, we provide practical and effective upgrade solutions. We believe that a milling head is not just an accessory, but a critical component that directly affects machining efficiency, stability, and the overall value of the machine. With the right milling head upgrade and integration, customers can significantly enhance performance without replacing the entire machine. Our core values are built on professionalism, reliability, and long-term partnership. Supported by a strong and experienced team in R&D, manufacturing, assembly, and after-sales service, we ensure strict quality control at every stage. YIH KUAN is not only a milling head manufacturer, but also a trusted partner in helping our customers achieve efficient and sustainable machining solutions.

description: Founded in 1965, NRB was the first company to manufacture needle roller bearings in India. For over 60 years NRB has pioneered the leading edge of bearing technology, and today over 90% of vehicles on Indian roads run on NRB parts. Since its inception, NRB has grown beyond its signature product to offer a wide range of high-precision friction solutions not only in the automotive sector, but across all mobility applications. NRB is the global benchmark for quality and innovative design in high-precision friction solutions. NRB Bearings is a recognized leader in needle roller bearings, conventional cylindrical roller bearings and has developed a new generation of lightweight drawn cup bearings.

description: CHUNLIN UNION CO ., established in 1993, is an affiliate of Minipan Ironworks. Initially set up to produce casings for Japanese processing equipment, it later focused on manufacturing small-scale food processing machinery and vacuum mixers for the chemical industry. In its mid-term, it specialized in customized machinery and refurbished used equipment, encompassing various industries including steel structures, metal cutting, plastic blow molding, and aluminum extrusion. Since 1998, it has been developing its own electrical control machinery plant, specializing in mechanical electrical control for over 20 years. In 2022, the family consolidated its brand companies and resources, merging Minipan and CHUNLIN, shifting to a brand-oriented business model, and establishing Shuang-Wei Precision Electromechanical Co., Ltd. as a key focus. Starting in 2023, it began collaborating with foreign manufacturers to jointly develop mechanical structures in Taiwan, conducting trials there, and developing its own brand of circular saws. It also acts as a distributor of band saws and related consumables and equipment.

product_categories: Blades,Sawing Machines
description: PRECISION FOR OVER 230 YEARS ARNTZ is more than a company, we are a living piece of industrial history. Rooted in the Bergisches Land, the cradle of German metalworking, we stand as Remscheid’s oldest tool manufacturer and a seventh- generation family business, combining tradition with technological progress. What began in 1793 has evolved into an internationally operating technology leader in high-performance band saw blades, with production facilities in Germany and the USA. Over two centuries of metalworking expertise are built into every product, forming the foundation for precision tools used in more than 80 countries worldwide. A striking example is the millimeter-accurate machining of the double T-beams for the One World Trade Center in the USA, carried out with band saw blades from ARNTZ. Our solutions cover a broad range of applications, from cutting tubes and profiles to the precise machining of high-strength titanium forgings for medical implants. Every production step passes through a multi-stage control system to ensure consistently measurable top quality.
address: Lenneper Str. 35, Remscheid
